basics.name: Ivan Kornienko
basics.label: Senior DevSecOps & Cloud Solutions Architect
basics.summary: Senior Cloud Infrastructure Consultant with 20+ years in IT, including 14 years contracting for top US/EU companies. Expert in Cloud Solutions Architecture (GCP, AWS), automated CI/CD/Sec pipelines, high-scale Kubernetes management, GitOps, MLOps, and AI Reliability (scaling LLM workloads, Karpenter, cost optimization). Contributor to Google Cloud Foundation Toolkit.

work.name: korn.systems
work.summary: Development of an advanced AI assistant and foundational infrastructure modules.
highlights: Architected and developed the korn.systems AI assistant integration.
Built and open-sourced terraform-spaceship-github-pages module for automated GitHub Pages and DNS management.
Developed, automated deployment, and open-sourced the korn.systems portfolio website.

work.name: METRO Digital
work.summary: Comprehensive cloud transformation, multi-cluster GCP migrations, and GitOps implementations across 500+ microservices.
highlights: Designed and executed the complete GCP migration path for hundreds of microservices, including a critical NoSQL database SaaS migration.
Replaced internal CD tools with ArgoCD using the app-of-apps pattern for highly scalable deployments.
Implemented secure Gateway API and GCP Private Service Connect (PSC), successfully replacing legacy HAProxy load balancers.
Migrated secrets to GCP Secret Manager, fully automated using Jenkins, Terraform, and SOPS.
Configured dynamic Jenkins pipelines with automatic repository discovery and dynamic configuration.
Developed reusable Terraform modules, structured Helm charts, and Kustomize templates for optimal Kubernetes multi-cluster management.

work.name: Voyc AI
work.summary: AI-powered compliance monitoring AWS cloud design and automation.
highlights: Designed highly available and cost-efficient AWS Cloud Architecture.
Automated infrastructure provisioning using OpenTofu, Terraform, and Terragrunt.
Implemented Karpenter for AWS EKS to achieve dynamic, cost-optimized scaling of Kubernetes nodes for AI workloads.

work.name: Elsewhen Ltd
work.summary: ETL pipeline implementation and IaC design for an advertisement firm.
highlights: Redesigned Cloud Architecture with a 5-layer system decomposition using Terraform.
Developed Python ETL pipelines for Google Cloud Composer (Apache Airflow), migrating from Airflow 1 to Airflow 2.
Provisioned Dataflow, DataCatalog, BigQuery, and Cloud Functions for the data stack.

work.name: American Robotics Corp
work.summary: Planned and drove comprehensive DevOps transformation.
highlights: Provisioned AWS infrastructure using Terraform and Terragrunt (EKS, Elastic Beanstalk, Lambda).
Implemented Jenkins and GitLab CI pipelines alongside ArgoCD for Kubernetes deployments.

work.name: American Broadcaster / Media Company
work.summary: Managed DevOps scope and IAM organization for a Next Gen TV Platform.
highlights: Designed a hybrid cloud architecture deploying GCP GKE and AWS EKS.
Configured Confluent Kafka Connections through VPC peering, Redis, and Apigee API Gateway.
Implemented Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines and Splunk Dashboards with Alerts.

work.name: SDLC Accelerator & Smart City Platform
work.summary: Bare-Metal SDLC and Kyiv Smart City infrastructure setup.
highlights: Built a Bare-Metal/Public Cloud Hybrid SDLC accelerator platform with Kubernetes/K3S and ArgoCD.
Designed and implemented the cloud infrastructure for Kyiv's Intelligent Traffic Management System (Green Wave) using GKE and Cloud Functions.

work.name: DevOps Training Lead & Mentor
work.summary: Directed Resource Development Centers in Poland and Ukraine.
highlights: Wrote syllabus and coached trainee systems engineers in Linux, networking, python, and cloud architecture.
Mentored trainee engineers, achieving a 5/5 score for lectures on DevOps and IaC.

work.name: US On-Site Cloud Consulting
work.summary: Delivered on-site CI/CD solutions in California and Connecticut.
highlights: Developed advanced CI/CD solutions in Connecticut for a major American Investment Management firm.
Maintained multi-node Hybris and Apache e-commerce clusters in California.

work.name: American Multi-Level Marketing Company
highlights: Drove migration to Kubernetes, architecting Helm charts and Ansible roles for a massive e-commerce deployment.

work.name: Worldwide Express Logistic Company
work.summary: Developing front-end solution to replace about 13 legacy systems.
highlights: Engineered continuous delivery pipelines and optimized infrastructure for the new unified front-end solution.

work.name: Major Retail Brand
highlights: Responsible for architecture design, developing, testing, and full system engineering efforts for the global rollout.

education.institution: National Technical University of Ukraine 'Kyiv Polytechnic Institute' (IASA)
National Technical University of Ukraine 'Kyiv Polytechnic Institute' (IASA)

caseStudies.name: GCP & NoSQL Database Migration
caseStudies.summary: Planned and executed the migration of a fleet of nearly a hundred microservices into GCP, and successfully migrated a critical NoSQL database to another SaaS vendor.

caseStudies.name: GitOps & ArgoCD Migration
caseStudies.summary: Replaced internal CD tools with ArgoCD, establishing an app-of-apps pattern to manage and deploy over 100+ microservices efficiently.

caseStudies.name: Web Routing Architecture
caseStudies.summary: Modernized web routing by replacing legacy HAProxy load balancers with secure Gateway API and GCP Private Service Connect (PSC).

caseStudies.name: Enterprise Secrets Management
caseStudies.summary: Migrated secrets to GCP Secret Manager, completely automating encryption and secure delivery pipelines using Jenkins, Terraform, and SOPS.

caseStudies.name: Dynamic CI Pipelines & Helm
caseStudies.summary: Configured dynamic Jenkins pipelines featuring automatic repository discovery, and built fully automated Helm charts for multi-cluster CI/CD.

caseStudies.name: AI-Powered Scaling Architecture
caseStudies.summary: Designed and provisioned AWS cloud architecture for AI-powered compliance monitoring. Automated complete infrastructure using OpenTofu and Karpenter.

caseStudies.name: Cloud Architecture & ETL
caseStudies.summary: Redesigned Cloud Architecture with a 5-layer infrastructure decomposition using Terraform. Developed an ETL pipeline in Python for Google Cloud Composer.

caseStudies.name: DevOps Transformation
caseStudies.summary: Planned and drove a comprehensive DevOps transformation for an American Robotics Corp, provisioning AWS infrastructure and implementing Jenkins/GitLab pipelines.

caseStudies.name: Next Gen TV Platform
caseStudies.summary: Managed DevOps scope for a major US media company, designing a hybrid cloud architecture spanning GCP GKE and AWS EKS with Kafka integration.

caseStudies.name: Intelligent Traffic Platform
caseStudies.summary: Designed and implemented the cloud infrastructure for Kyiv's Intelligent Traffic Management System (Green Wave), utilizing GKE and Cloud Functions.

caseStudies.name: Platform Migration & Architecture
caseStudies.summary: Led the infrastructure engineering and Kubernetes migration for a major multi-level marketing company, architecting Helm charts and Ansible roles.

caseStudies.name: Legacy Systems Modernization
caseStudies.summary: Engineered continuous delivery pipelines and optimized infrastructure for a unified front-end solution replacing 13 legacy systems for a logistics giant.
